title: Outocraft-Server
description: Server hosting pack for Outotocraft modpack
body:
This pack is for those who want to host server for [Outocraft Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/outocraft)

Some unnecessary client mods are removed and some server only has been added. Required configs and server.properties file are included in pack with fabric-server.jar file.

You should receive mods folder and configureddefaults folder what includes recomended changes to configs. Configs and files should be loaded from there automaticly when you first time start server.

args.txt file can be used to launch server with basic recomended JVM arguments using command.

```
java @args.txt -jar fabric-server-mc.1.20.1-loader.0.17.2-launcher.1.1.0.jar nogui
```
Copy args.txt to same folder as fabric-server.jar file otherwise that command doesn't work.



<details>
<summary>Mods included in server</summary>
